questions.question: Which institution launched Sampoornata Abhiyan 2.0?
questions.explanation: NITI Aayog launched ‘Sampoornata Abhiyan 2.0’, a 3-month campaign from 28th January to 14th April 2026, to saturate key indicators in Aspirational Districts and Blocks. The campaign builds on Sampoornata Abhiyan 2024, targeting 112 Aspirational Districts and 513 Aspirational Blocks under the Aspirational Districts and Blocks Programme. Districts/Blocks will develop 3-month action plans, track monthly progress, conduct awareness campaigns, and perform concurrent monitoring visits. NITI Aayog, Central Ministries, States, and UTs will coordinate for planning, capacity building, and sustainable service delivery.

questions.question: Who became the Indian Army’s first woman pilot qualified to fly the Rudra Armed Helicopter?
questions.explanation: Captain Hansja Sharma became the Indian Army’s first woman pilot qualified to fly the Rudra Armed Helicopter. She led the 251 Army Aviation Squadron during the Army Day Parade 2026 in Rajasthan. She topped training at the Combat Army Aviation Training School (CAATS), Nashik. She is the first woman officer to receive the Silver Cheetah Trophy for best combat aviator. She also secured First in Order of Merit in the 107th Air Traffic Management and Air Laws course. Rudra, also called Advanced Light Helicopter–Weapon System Integrated (ALH-WSI), is an indigenous armed helicopter by Hindustan Aeronautics Limited (HAL).

questions.question: The V-BAT autonomous unmanned aerial system (UAS) is developed by which country?
questions.explanation: The Indian Army has officially selected the US-based firm Shield AI to supply its advanced V-BAT autonomous drones under an emergency procurement deal, marking a major step in adopting AI-driven warfare systems. This procurement is significant as it enables India to integrate Hivemind AI software, allowing sovereign development and control of autonomous military capabilities. The V-BAT autonomous unmanned aerial system (UAS) is developed and manufactured by Shield AI, a US-based defense technology company. The V-BAT is classified as a Group 3 Vertical Take-Off and Landing (VTOL) Unmanned Aircraft System (UAS) designed for long-endurance and high-risk missions.

questions.question: Sunabeda Wildlife Sanctuary which was declared Maoist-free in January 2026, is located in which state?
questions.explanation: The Sunabeda Wildlife Sanctuary in Nuapada district, Odisha was declared Maoist-free in January 2026, enabling improved wildlife monitoring and conservation activities. In the All-India Tiger Estimation exercise (data yet to be officially released), authorities estimate over 70 leopards, with 90% camera traps capturing leopard images. Nuapada district regularly reports human–leopard conflict, supporting evidence of a strong leopard presence. Reduced Maoist activity enabled camera trap installation across all sanctuary sectors for the first time.

questions.question: Which Indian institution recently developed a new method to predict solar cycles?
questions.explanation: Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Kanpur researchers developed a new method to predict solar cycles. A solar cycle is an about 11-year cycle of solar activity controlled by the Sun’s magnetic field. It is measured by the number and intensity of sunspots seen on the Sun’s surface. Around every 11 years, the Sun’s magnetic field flips, swapping north and south poles. Sunspots increase and decrease as magnetic activity changes on the Sun. The cycle starts with solar minimum, when sunspots are very few. Activity rises to solar maximum, when sunspots are highest. After this, activity declines back to solar minimum and a new cycle begins.

questions.question: Which organization has launched the AI-driven platform Pragya-AIX for upstream oil and gas operations?
questions.explanation: Oil and Natural Gas Corporation (ONGC) launched Pragya-AIX, its Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Innovation Exchange, marking a major digital transformation. Pragya-AIX integrates over 26 intelligent applications into a unified digital platform for daily operations across ONGC’s workcentres. The platform centralizes AI for seismic analytics, production optimisation, and smart field monitoring. Pragya-AIX converts raw data into strategic decisions, enhancing safety, process efficiency, and cost savings across the hydrocarbon value chain.

questions.question: Rusoma Orange Festival is primarily celebrated in which state?
questions.explanation: The 5th edition of the Rüsoma Orange Festival began at Rüsoma village, about 10 kilometres from Kohima, Nagaland. It is a two-day festival held under the theme “Abundance of Rüsoma.” The festival aims to promote village welfare, rural entrepreneurship, and honour orange growers. It highlights the unique taste and quality of Rüsoma oranges.

questions.question: The Open Acreage Licensing Policy (OALP) was introduced as part of which broader policy framework?
questions.explanation: Oil India carried out seismic studies in blocks won under the ninth round to plan bidding for the tenth round. The Open Acreage Licensing Policy was introduced by the Government of India under the Hydrocarbon Exploration and Licensing Policy. It replaced the New Exploration and Licensing Policy that operated for over eighteen years. Under this policy, companies can choose and explore oil and gas blocks on their own. Exploration can begin without waiting for government notifications. The policy also allows access to seismic data from the National Data Repository.

questions.question: Rheumatoid Arthritis Awareness Day is observed annually on which day?
questions.explanation: Rheumatoid Arthritis Awareness Day is observed every year on 2 February to spread awareness about rheumatoid arthritis. Rheumatoid arthritis is an autoimmune disease affecting millions of people worldwide. The day was started in 2013 by the Rheumatoid Patient Foundation to educate the public and break myths. The organisation is now inactive, leading to limited global observance of the day. The awareness day highlights the need for early diagnosis and timely treatment. It promotes advocacy, support systems, and research for better care.

questions.question: Which ministry launched the ‘MY Bharat Budget Quest 2026’?

options.label: D
options.text: Ministry of Youth Affairs and Sports

answer.label: D
answer.text: Ministry of Youth Affairs and Sports

questions.explanation: Union Minister for Youth Affairs and Sports Dr. Mansukh Mandaviya launched MY Bharat Budget Quest 2026, a youth-focused initiative to increase understanding of the Union Budget. The initiative connects the Union Budget 2026 with citizens’ everyday lives through participatory engagement of youth from colleges, institutions, and coaching centres. The competition runs on the MY Bharat platform, with the first round being a national-level online quiz.
